urdu transliteration text:
Ay Shaam Ke Logon Mein Binte Ali HoonOh people of Shaam, I'm the daughter of Ali (as)English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Ay Shaam Ke Logon Mein Binte Ali Hoon
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Oh people of Shaam, I'm the daughter of Ali (as)
I'm the inheritor of purity, I'm the honour of the Prophet (pbuh)

urdu transliteration text:
Bazaar Se Darbaar Mein Ley Aaey Ho Mujhko Chahoon To Jala Sakti Hoon Khutbon Se Mein TumkoSabir Ki Bahen Hoon Jo Mein Khamosh Khari Hoon
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I'm the inheritor of purity, I'm the honour of the Prophet (pbuh),
You've brought me from the bazar to the court,
If I wish, I could burn you with my sermons,
I'm the sister of the patient one  hence standing in silence,

urdu transliteration text:
Afsos Kaneezi Mein Usay Maang Rahay HoTum Jiskay Ghulamon Ki Ghulami Mein Rahay HoYeh Zulm Na Hoga Kabhi Mein Zinda Abhi Hoon
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
It is a shame that you're asking to take her as a slave,
You ought to be the servant of her servants,
This oppression will never take place while I am still alive

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Apne Payambar Ko Agar Dekhna ChahoNaizay Pe Jo Yeh Sar Hai Isay Ghor Se DekhoHam Shakl-e-Payamabar Hai Yeh Mein Iski Phupi Hoon
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
If you wish to see your Prophet (pbuh),
Look carefully at this head on the spear,
He is the image of the Prophet and I am his aunt

Oh Lord! What can be more difficult time than this,
Even the supporters of Fizza are present in the court,

urdu transliteration text:
Zehra Ko Bhi Darbaar Mein Tum Ne Tha BulayaDarbaar Mein Mein Bhi Hoon Magar Farq Hai ItnaParday Mein Thi Voh Aur Mein Bey Parda Khari Hoon
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You had also called Bibi Zahra (s.a) to the court,
I too am in the court but the difference is this,
She was her veil on, and I'm not

urdu transliteration text:
Honay Lagi Darbaar Mein Mushtar Ka AzaaneinRehan Idhar Naam-e-Nabi Goonja Fiza MeinBibi Ne Kaha Fakhr Se Mein Jeet Gaee Hoon
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
In the court the Adhan is being recited,
When the name of the Prophet echoed in the court,
Bibi Zainab (a.) said with pride that I have won
